actions.removeLastOwner: Cannot remove the last owner — promote another member to owner first or delete the group.

adminOnlyHelp: Only admins and owners can change roles, remove members, or manage invites.
empty: This group has no members yet.

errors.lastMember: Couldn't remove. That would leave the group empty — delete the group instead.
errors.lastOwner: Couldn't remove. They're the last owner — promote another member to owner first.

dialog.description: Send an invite link to add someone to this location group.
dialog.title: Invite to {{group}}
dialog.tokenFallback: Or create a copy-paste invite link instead

revokeConfirm.description: The invite sent to {{email}} will be cancelled. They won't be able to use the invite link anymore.
revokeConfirm.title: Revoke invite?

invites.copyFailed: Couldn't copy. Select the text above to copy manually.
invites.createError: Couldn't generate an invite link. Please try again.
invites.empty: No active invite links — use Invite above to create one.
invites.revokeError: Couldn't revoke this invite. Used invites can't be revoked.
invites.title: Invite links

removeConfirm.description: They'll lose access to this group's data. You can re-invite them later.
removeConfirm.title: Remove {{name}}?

roleDescriptions.admin: Can manage members, group info, locations and areas
roleDescriptions.owner: Full access including deleting the group and all data
roleDescriptions.user: Can add and remove items (not locations or areas)
roleDescriptions.viewer: Can view all items, but cannot make any changes

subtitle: Manage who can access this group and their roles.
title: Members
